profile.summary: TypeScript/NestJS engineer with API and Postgres experience.

jobDescription: Northwind Labs needs a Senior Backend Engineer to design NestJS APIs, model PostgreSQL schemas, and use Redis for caching. You will own service reliability and mentoring. TypeScript is required; Kubernetes is nice to have.
cvText:
Alex Rivera
Backend Engineer

Experience:
- Built NestJS APIs at Contoso Systems (2021-2025)
- Designed PostgreSQL schemas and Redis caching layers
- Mentored two junior engineers

Skills: TypeScript, NestJS, PostgreSQL, Redis, Docker
Education: BSc Computer Science, State University
baselineCoverLetter:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am applying for the Senior Backend Engineer role at Northwind Labs. At Contoso Systems I built NestJS APIs in TypeScript, designed PostgreSQL schemas, and introduced Redis caching. I have also mentored junior engineers and care about reliable services.

I would welcome the chance to bring that experience to your team.

Sincerely,
Alex Rivera
